title: Animal Cell
description: Interactive labeled diagram of an animal cell over a rendered background image, with an explore mode that reveals organelle structure/function and a click-to-identify quiz mode
subject: Biology - Cell Structure
creator: Claude AI with Interactive Infographic Overlay Skill
audience: College Placement Biology / Advanced High School
features: Background image with calibrated hotspot overlay
SVG leader lines from marker to label
Explore mode with structure/function and exam-tip callouts
Edit mode (?edit=true) for recalibrating marker positions
xAPI emission for both explore and quiz modes
learningObjectives: Identify the nucleus, cell membrane, cytoplasm, ribosomes, mitochondria, and endoplasmic reticulum on a schematic animal cell
Explain how structure supports function for each organelle
Trace the movement of a newly synthesized protein through the endomembrane system
Connect each organelle to a relevant college placement Biology concept
